“Absolutely amazing service! The team was professional, thorough, and left my home spotless. I couldn't believe how clean everything was. Will definitely book again!”

“Best cleaning service in LA! On time, friendly, and did an incredible deep clean. My kitchen has never looked this good. Highly recommend Glow & Go!”

James T.February 2025

“I've tried many cleaning companies but Glow & Go is on another level. They pay attention to every detail and are very responsive. 5 stars all the way!”

Emily R.April 2025

FAQ

Answers to
what matters.

Pricing depends on your home and cleaning needs. Minimum booking is 2 hours, starting at $135. Typically, this covers 2–3 rooms, including a full bathroom and kitchen. Get your quote online — no hidden fees.
Absolutely. Every member of our team is background-checked, interviewed in person, and fully insured. Each cleaner is personally trained by our founder, who holds an exceptionally high standard of trust and quality. Your home's safety and your peace of mind are our top priorities.
Not at all! We love pets. Just let us know you have furry friends when booking so our team can come prepared and make sure your pets are comfortable during the clean.
Tips are never expected but always appreciated. If you feel your cleaner went above and beyond, a tip is a wonderful way to show your gratitude — but it's entirely up to you.
After each cleaning, we'll follow up to make sure everything meets your expectations. If you'd like to leave a tip, you can do so through us — simple and personal.
Full payment is required to secure your booking. Submit your request, and we'll send you a detailed quote. If we're unable to perform your cleaning on the scheduled date, you'll receive a full refund or the option to reschedule.
